description: Bacteriophage lambda bacterial attachment site attB (BOB′); the 21 bp E. coli chromosomal target (gal–bio) for lambda Int + IHF site-specific integration.

references.title: Conditional-replication, integration, excision, and retrieval plasmid-host systems for gene structure-function studies of bacteria

references.authors: St-Pierre F, Cui L, Priest DG, Endy D, Dodd IB, Shearwin KE
references.title: One-step cloning and chromosomal integration of DNA

label: lambda_attB
note: Lambda bacterial attachment site attB (B-O-B′), the chromosomal target recombined with phage attP (lambda_attP) by lambda tyrosine integrase + IHF (Xis/Fis for excision). 21 bp minimal attB from NC_000913.3 (attλ, between gal and bio); 15 bp common core O = GCTTTTTTATACTAA, with the 7 bp crossover overlap TTTATAC at which Int makes the staggered cut. Source-verified 100%. Cognate phage site: lambda_attP.

provenance.sequence_source: NC_000913.3 (E. coli K-12 MG1655), attλ locus between the gal and bio operons, positions 807326..807346 (+ strand), 100% identity over 21 bp
